studyName: METSIM Subcutaneous Adipose Needle Biopsy ATAC-Seq

tables.description: This sample attributes table contains sample ID, body site where sample was collected, analyte type, tumor status, histological type, version of the ATAC-seq protocol used, amount of adipose tissue used, amount of the Tn5 transposase used, single- or paired-end sequencing, ID of the fastq files, lab in which the ATAC-seq experiments were performed, read length, number of (n=7 variables; raw ATAC sequenced reads, adapter-trimmed and base quality-trimmed ATAC reads before alignment, reads aligned to the hg19 genome, reads aligned to nuclear chromosomes, reads aligning to the mitochondrial chromosome, nuclear alignments after removing duplicates, and narrow peaks called by MACS2), percentage of (n=4 variables; uniquely aligned reads on nuclear chromosomes, uniquely aligned reads mapping to the mitochondrial chromosome, nuclear reads remaining after duplicate removal, non-duplicated nuclear alignments overlapping narrow peaks), TSS enrichments calculated by ataqv or by a customized script that allows single-end libraries, and whether the library was included in the final set used for analyses in PMID:34699533.

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte Type

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: FILE_ID
variables.description: ID of the fastq files

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: IS_INCLUDED_IN_MANUSCRIPT
variables.description: Whether the library was included in the final set used for analyses in PMID: 34699533 (Perrin and Currin et al. 2021)

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: LAB
variables.description: Lab in which the ATAC-seq experiments were performed

variables.name: NUM_AFTER_DUPS_REMOVED
variables.description: Number of nuclear alignments after removing duplicates

variables.name: NUM_CHR_M
variables.description: Number of reads aligning to the mitochondrial chromosome

variables.name: NUM_FILTERED
variables.description: Number of adapter-trimmed and base quality-trimmed ATAC reads before alignment

variables.name: NUM_NUCLEAR
variables.description: Number of reads aligned to nuclear chromosomes (chr1-22, X, Y)

variables.name: NUM_N_PEAKS
variables.description: Number of narrow peaks called by MACS2

variables.name: NUM_RAW
variables.description: Number of raw ATAC sequenced reads

variables.name: NUM_UNIQUE_ALIGNED
variables.description: Number of reads aligned to the hg19 genome with mapq>20

variables.name: PERCENT_AFTER_DUPS_REMOVED
variables.description: Percentage of nuclear reads remaining after duplicate removal

variables.name: PERCENT_CHR_M
variables.description: Percentage of uniquely aligned reads mapping to the mitochondrial chromosome

variables.name: PERCENT_NUCLEAR
variables.description: Percentage of uniquely aligned reads on nuclear chromosomes

variables.name: PERCENT_READS_IN_N_PEAKS
variables.description: Percentage of non-duplicated, nuclear alignments overlapping narrow peaks

variables.name: PROTOCOL
variables.description: Version of the ATAC-seq protocol used

variables.name: READ_LENGTH
variables.description: Read length; many samples were trimmed to 50nt for consistent read length

variables.name: READ_TYPE
variables.description: Indicates if single- or paired-end sequencing

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: TISSUE_AMOUNT
variables.description: Amount of adipose tissue used, either in milligrams or number of cells depending on the protocol

variables.name: TN5_CONCENTRATION
variables.description: Amount of the Tn5 transposase used in the ATAC-seq protocol

variables.name: TSS_ENRICHMENT_ATAQV
variables.description: TSS enrichment calculated by ataqv

variables.name: TSS_ENRICHMENT_MYSCRIPT
variables.description: TSS enrichment calculated by a customized script that allows single-end libraries
